diff:
diff --git a/src/preferences.py b/src/preferences.py
index deba08a..9e8c3d7 100644
--- a/src/preferences.py
+++ b/src/preferences.py
@@ -1,9 +1,35 @@
+import copy
+
 def merge_preferences(defaults: dict, overrides: dict) -> dict:
-    merged = defaults.copy()
+    """Merge two preference dictionaries without mutating the inputs.
+
+    Parameters
+    ----------
+    defaults: dict
+        Default preferences.
+    overrides: dict
+        User-supplied overrides.
+
+    Returns
+    -------
+    dict
+        New dictionary containing the merged preferences.
+    """
+    # Create a deep copy of defaults to avoid mutating nested structures.
+    merged = copy.deepcopy(defaults)
+
+    # Merge notifications dictionary.
     notifications = merged.setdefault("notifications", {})
-    notifications.update(overrides.get("notifications", {}))
+    # Use a copy of the override notifications to prevent mutations.
+    override_notifs = overrides.get("notifications", {})
+    notifications.update(override_notifs)
+
+    # Merge tags list.
     tags = merged.setdefault("tags", [])
-    tags.extend(overrides.get("tags", []))
+    override_tags = overrides.get("tags", [])
+    tags.extend(override_tags)
+
+    # Merge remaining keys directly.
     for key, value in overrides.items():
         if key not in {"notifications", "tags"}:
             merged[key] = value
